title: Table dbo.Patient
text: CREATE TABLE dbo.Patient ( PatientId INT PRIMARY KEY, MRN VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL, DOB DATE NULL, Sex CHAR(1) NULL, PostalCode VARCHAR(10) NULL, CreatedAt DATETIME2 NOT NULL);

title: Table dbo.Encounter
text: CREATE TABLE dbo.Encounter ( EncounterId BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, PatientId INT NOT NULL, EncounterDtm DATETIME2 NOT NULL, FacilityCode VARCHAR(10) NULL, ChiefComplaint NVARCHAR(4000) NULL, TriageAcuity VARCHAR(10) NULL, Disposition VARCHAR(50) NULL); -- FK: dbo.Encounter.PatientId -> dbo.Patient.PatientId

title: Table dbo.Diagnosis
text: CREATE TABLE dbo.Diagnosis ( DxId BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, EncounterId BIGINT NOT NULL, DxCode VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, DxSystem VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, DxDescription NVARCHAR(255) NULL, DxRank INT NULL); -- FK: dbo.Diagnosis.EncounterId -> dbo.Encounter.EncounterId
